creator: h@hartzer.sh
text:
Can we backport this to quarterly? (2024Q3)

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=88c12b53a49ce5d7686cfcda9e2409ed3c1bd0f2

x265 won't build in quarterly, which breaks a ton of other packages.

Related: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280674
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/disappearance-of-desktop-applications-firefox-thunderbird-from-repositories.94550/
